**Title:** AC-BUG-UI_FRONT-001 Chat input field shifts to the top of the screen on iOS Chrome browser

**Description:**

In the Chrome browser on iOS, tapping the chat input field causes the entire chat interface to scroll upwards. The input field remains fixed at the top edge of the screen, causing layout issues.

**Details:** See full Bug Report 
- Test Case: 
- Severity: Low | Priority: P3 High
- Environment: Chrome iOS 26.4.2, Browser: Chrome 189.110.145.218, Device: iPhone 15 Plus
- 100% reproducible
